name: Path Traversal: 'dir\..\..\filename'
description: The product does not properly neutralize multiple backslash dot-dot sequences ('dir\..\..\') in user-supplied pathnames, allowing multi-level directory traversal on Windows systems outside restricted directories.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides path data containing multiple chained '\..\' backslash traversal sequences that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node performing full path canonicalization and directory containment validation
